issues.current_definition: a small soft creature with many legs that eats leaves and later turns into a butterfly or moth

issues.suggested_fix: Re-evaluate if this word belongs in K-1 or move to a higher level.

issues.current_definition: a small brown nut that grows underground in a shell
issues.current_example: She cracked open the peanut shell and ate the nut inside.
